sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n4776" key="a)lfitoeidh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀλφῐτο-ειδής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n4776.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">like</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἄλφιτα,</foreign> Poet. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">de herb.</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">77</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
